data.title: Whale Reacquires Ethereum After Recent Sale
data.description: A significant Ethereum holder has repurchased 7,448 ETH at a price of $2,350 each, totaling $17.5 million. According to ChainCatcher, this transaction follows the sale of 10,829 ETH three days earlier at $2,300 per ETH, amounting to $24.91 million.

data.title: As optimism fades, Asian stock markets give back their gains.
data.description: Asian markets opened very strongly and actively, especially Japan and South Korea. However, some Asian markets have now given back some of their gains. All of this points to the typical volatility triggered by the Iran-Iraq conflict. Initially, especially on Wednesday, we saw many investors optimistic about the conflict—the ceasefire was maintained, and there seemed to be a strong desire to end the war. Investors often make decisions based on what will happen in the future, hence we saw those stock markets rise to record highs. Now, especially with the attacks continuing, no plans for peace talks, and no clear path to truly ending the conflict—some caution has returned, so we are seeing these stock markets fall back to lower levels. (Jinshi)

data.title: BitMart is now available on Genius Terminal (GENIUS).
data.description: According to the official announcement, BitMart will list Genius Terminal (GENIUS) on April 23rd at 12:00 (UTC+8), with the GENIUS/USDT trading pair available. Genius Terminal is the first privacy-focused on-chain ultimate trading terminal, a next-generation product following aggregators, cross-chain bridges, and wallet plugins, designed for professional users who want to enjoy DeFi functionality without the hassle of complex experiences. The platform requires no multi-authorization bridging or asset wrapping, has no signature pop-ups, supports programmable trading strategies, and unifies spot trading, perpetual contracts, pre-issued tokens, and yield management within a single account. Orders are executed via the Genius Bridge Protocol across 150+ DEXs on 9 blockchains. The Ghost Orders feature allows transactions to be split across up to 500 wallets for on-chain privacy. The project is invested in by YZi Labs (formerly Binance Labs), with CZ serving as an advisor.

data.title: Bitget has launched USD-margined OPG perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1x to 20x.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bitget has launched USDT-margined OPG perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1x to 20x. Contract trading on bots will also be available simultaneously.

data.title: A whale bought back 7,448 ETH for $2,350, after previously selling them at $2,300 each.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale (0x65B4) sold 10,829 ETH at $2,300 a day ago, worth $24.91 million. One hour ago, the whale bought back 7,448 ETH at $2,350 a day, worth $17.5 million.

data.title: BitMine Suspected of Acquiring 100,000 ETH in Recent Transaction
data.description: BitMine is suspected of purchasing 100,000 ETH, valued at approximately $234 million. According to Foresight News, Lookonchain monitoring revealed that three newly created wallets, potentially linked to BitMine, received 100,000 ETH from BitGo.

data.title: CertiK Highlights Emerging Threats in Crypto Security
data.description:
Real-time deepfakes, phishing, supply chain attacks, and cross-chain vulnerabilities are expected to be the primary sources of crypto hacking, according to ChainCatcher. CertiK's senior blockchain investigator, Natalie Newson, emphasized these concerns, noting that the industry has already suffered losses exceeding $600 million due to hacking incidents. Notable cases include the Kelp DAO breach, which resulted in a $293 million loss, and the Drift Protocol theft of $280 million, both linked to North Korean hacker groups.

Newson warned that the rapid advancement of AI could lead to more sophisticated attack methods, such as more realistic deepfakes, autonomous attack agents, and 'agent AI' capable of automatically scanning for smart contract vulnerabilities. However, AI can also serve as a defensive tool. CertiK advises investors to verify the authenticity of URLs and use cold wallets for asset storage to mitigate risks.

data.title: West Main Self Storage Increases Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: West Main Self Storage has increased its Bitcoin holdings by 0.13 BTC, bringing its total to 4.317 BTC. According to Foresight News, this update was monitored by BitcoinTreasuries.NET.

data.title: F2Pool Co-Founder Reflects on SPK Token Sale
data.description: F2Pool co-founder Wang Chun recently shared on X that he received 83.7 million SPK tokens as rewards from Spark over the past year. According to ChainCatcher, Wang sold these tokens on CoWSwap, obtaining 663 ETH and $1.4 million in return. He expressed some regret over the decision.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Industry Fulfills Promises, Yet Profits Remain Elusive for Many
data.description:
The cryptocurrency industry is making strides in delivering on its promises, yet many investors find themselves not reaping the expected financial rewards. According to PANews, despite the sector's advancements and the increasing adoption of digital currencies, a significant number of participants are not experiencing the anticipated financial gains.

The industry has seen substantial growth, with numerous projects achieving their developmental milestones. However, the complexity of the market and the volatility of digital assets have left many investors struggling to navigate the landscape effectively.

Experts suggest that the lack of profits for some investors may be attributed to several factors, including market fluctuations, regulatory challenges, and the inherent risks associated with cryptocurrency investments. Additionally, the rapid pace of technological advancements and the emergence of new projects can make it difficult for investors to keep up and make informed decisions.

While the industry continues to evolve and mature, it remains crucial for investors to conduct thorough research and exercise caution when engaging with digital assets. As the market develops, the potential for profit remains, but it requires a strategic approach and an understanding of the risks involved.

data.title: Tria Integrates Decentralized Exchange Decibel for Enhanced User Experience
data.description:
Tria, a non-custodial financial application, has integrated with the decentralized perpetual contract exchange Decibel as of April 21. According to ChainCatcher, this integration allows Tria users to access Decibel's on-chain central limit order book for perpetual contract trading without needing to switch wallets or conduct cross-chain asset transfers. The initiative aims to streamline DeFi operations by unifying derivatives trading, yield aggregation, and cross-chain payments within a single interface.

Decibel, built on the Aptos network, launched its mainnet in February 2026. During its testnet phase, it recorded over 650,000 unique accounts and more than 1 million daily transactions. Tria currently serves over 500,000 users across 150 countries, with investors including Polychain Capital and the Ethereum Foundation.

data.title: BitMart contracts will list AAOIUSDT and BEUSDT.
data.description: According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch AAOIUSDT and BEUSDT perpetual contracts on April 23, 2026 at 16:00 (UTC+8), supporting leverage up to 20x.

data.title: Bitmine is suspected of buying 100,000 ETH, worth $233.7 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, three new addresses (0xB6a8...9c9E, 0xc2e0...2831, 0x4e5C...276c) suspected of being associated with Tom Lee's Bitmine received 100,000 ETH from BitGo, worth $233.7 million.

data.title: ACI Worldwide Executive Questions Stablecoin Bill Pay Demand
data.description: Ron Shultz, who oversees ACI Worldwide's bill payment division, has expressed skepticism regarding the use of stablecoins for bill payments. According to NS3.AI, Shultz challenged proponents of the stablecoin bill-pay concept to identify ten individuals interested in utilizing stablecoins for such transactions. In contrast, Louis Amira, co-founder of Circuit & Chisel, noted a shift in demand, reporting the creation of hundreds of thousands of accounts and tens of thousands of daily users engaging with ATXP products.

data.title: Wang Chun: I sold 83.7 million SPK tokens last year, and now I'm a little regretful.
data.description: F2Pool co-founder Wang Chun posted on X: "In the past year, I received 83.7 million SPK rewards from Spark and sold them on CoWSwap for 663 ETH and $1.4 million. Now I'm a little regretful."

data.title: Vercel CEO Reports Extensive Security Investigation Following Context.ai Breach
data.description:
Vercel's CEO, Guillermo Rauch, announced that the team has completed a comprehensive security investigation, analyzing over 1 petabyte of Vercel network and API logs. According to Foresight News, this investigation extends beyond the initial Context.ai account breach.

The findings reveal that the attackers' activities surpassed Context.ai, distributing malware more broadly with the aim of stealing account keys from platforms like Vercel. Once the keys are obtained, attackers swiftly enumerate non-sensitive environment variables.

In response, Vercel has intensified collaboration with industry partners such as Microsoft, AWS, and Wiz to safeguard the broader internet ecosystem. Other potential victims have been notified, with recommendations to immediately rotate credentials and enhance security best practices.

data.title: Aurise Foundation Launches Yield-Bearing Gold Token XAUE on Ethereum
data.description:
Aurise Foundation has announced the launch of XAUE, a yield-bearing gold token on Ethereum. According to Odaily, XAUE is designed to serve as a yield-generating treasury for Tether Gold (XAU₮). The token targets compliant institutional participants, introducing crypto-native returns to traditional non-yielding gold through quantitative strategies and institutional lending, transforming it into a programmable and capital-efficient on-chain asset.

Currently, ecosystem partners Aurelion and Antalpha have collectively contributed 16,052 XAU₮ to XAUE. The protocol employs an exchange rate growth model, where the gold value anchored to each XAUE increases with accumulated returns. Future plans include integration with more decentralized finance protocols such as DEXs.

data.title: Japan Proposes New Crypto Asset Regulations to Enhance User Protection
data.description:
Japan's Financial Services Agency (FSA) has submitted a bill to the extraordinary Diet session to transfer crypto assets from the Payment Services Act to the Financial Instruments and Exchange Act. According to BlockBeats, this move aims to strengthen user protection through several key measures. These include differentiating between issuers based on information disclosure, establishing a new category for crypto asset trading businesses, increasing penalties for unlicensed operators, and introducing regulations on insider trading and a levy system.

Additionally, the FSA is conducting three ongoing pilot projects under the 'Payment Innovation Project' (PIP) launched in November last year. The first project involves the joint issuance of a yen stablecoin by major banks to verify the efficiency of cross-border settlements for large trading companies. The second project focuses on on-chain securities settlement, using blockchain to record the transfer of rights for government bonds and stocks, aiming for 24/7 continuous trading settlement through stablecoin payments. The third project explores the interbank transfer of tokenized deposits, linking with the Bank of Japan's 'Central Bank Current Account Tokenization Sandbox Project.'

data.title: SPK rose above $0.55, surging over 80% on the day.
data.description: OKX market data shows that SPK has risen above $0.55, up more than 80% on the day, and is currently trading at $0.555.

data.title: Iranian Foreign Minister: The US and Israel are the root cause of insecurity in the Gulf; they will bear all the consequences.
data.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Araqchi, during a meeting with the South Korean special envoy in Tehran, stated that the aggression by the United States and Israel is the root cause of insecurity in the Gulf region and the Strait of Hormuz. We urge all countries to take a clear and firm stance in condemning these attacks. As a coastal state, Iran has taken measures in accordance with international law to defend its security and interests, and the aggressors will bear all responsibility for the consequences. (Jin Shi)
